# Dependencies — Line 8 Other Income (Schedule 1 Part I)

This document covers every input and output for the line 8 / Schedule 1 Part I computation pass.

Tax year: **2025**

---

## Line identity (2025 Form 1040)

- **Form 1040 line 8** — Additional income from Schedule 1, line 10.
- **Schedule 1 line 10** = `line1 + line2a + line3 + line4 + line5 + line6 + line7 + line9`.
- **Schedule 1 line 9** = sum of lines 8a through 8z (23 sublines; 8w/8x/8y do NOT exist).
- **Line 2b** is informational only (date of original divorce/separation agreement) — NOT in line 10 arithmetic.

```text
Form1040.line8 = Schedule1.line10   (override via manualOtherIncomeLine8 on social-security-benefits-taxpayer form)
```

Line 8 is a pure carryover from Schedule 1 Part I. Can be positive, zero, or negative depending on signed items.

**Routing of negative items:** Sublines **8a** (NOL), **8d** (Form 2555 FEIE), and **8s** (Medicaid waiver offset) are negative-entry sublines. The Form 1040 line 8 itself can therefore be negative.

---

## Input personal forms

| Form ID | Firestore path | Person | Fields consumed |
|---|---|---|---|
| `other-incomes-taxpayer` | `users/{uid}/other-incomes-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | `hadAdditionalIncomeForSchedule1`, `hasUploadedAtLeastOneOtherIncomeStatement`, `received1099G`, `uploaded1099G`, `received1099C`, `uploaded1099C`, `receivedForm2555`, `uploadedForm2555`, `receivedForm8853`, `uploadedForm8853`, `receivedForm8889`, `uploadedForm8889`, `confirmAllReceivedOtherIncomeStatementsUploaded`, `hasScheduleCBusinessIncomeOutOfScope` (BLOCKING out-of-scope), `hasScheduleFFarmIncomeOutOfScope` (BLOCKING out-of-scope), `hasSection962CfcElection` (BLOCKING out-of-scope), `taxableStateLocalRefundsLine1`, `alimonyReceivedLine2a`, `alimonyAgreementDateLine2b`, `otherGainsLossesLine4`, `rentalRealEstateRoyaltiesLine5`, `unemploymentCompensationLine7`, `repaidUnemploymentOverpaymentIn2025`, `unemploymentRepaymentAdjustment`, `form1099KPersonalItemsDisclosureAmount` (top-of-Schedule-1 entry space — NOT in line 10 arithmetic), `otherIncomeNetOperatingLoss8a` (negative), `otherIncomeGambling8b`, `otherIncomeCancellationOfDebt8c`, `otherIncomeForeignEarnedIncomeExclusion8d` (negative; manual override), `otherIncomeForm88538e`, `otherIncomeForm88898f`, `otherIncomeAlaskaPermanentFundDividends8g`, `otherIncomeJuryDutyPay8h`, `otherIncomePrizesAwards8i`, `otherIncomeHobbyIncome8j`, `otherIncomeStockOptions8k`, `otherIncomeRentalPersonalProperty8l`, `otherIncomeOlympicParalympic8m`, `otherIncomeSection951a8n`, `otherIncomeSection951A8o`, `otherIncomeSection461l8p`, `otherIncomeAbleDistributions8q`, `otherIncomeScholarships8r`, `otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp8t`, `otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u`, `otherIncomeDigitalAssets8v`, `otherIncomeItems8z[]` (list: description + amount), `imported1099GLine1TaxableRefunds`, `imported1099GLine7UnemploymentCompensation`, `imported1099CLine8cCancellationOfDebt`, `importedForm8853Line8e`, `importedForm8889Line8f` |
| `other-incomes-spouse` | `users/{uid}/other-incomes-spouse` | Spouse (MFJ only) | Same `otherIncome*` line fields as taxpayer form plus `form1099KPersonalItemsDisclosureAmount` and `hasSection962CfcElection`. No statement-upload gating fields (those live on taxpayer form only). No `hasScheduleCBusinessIncomeOutOfScope` / `hasScheduleFFarmIncomeOutOfScope` (taxpayer-side only blockers on MFS — though on MFJ both are checked). Null-shadowed on MFS. |
| `social-security-benefits-taxpayer` | `users/{uid}/social-security-benefits-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | `manualOtherIncomeLine8` — overrides Schedule-1-derived line 8 via `firstNonNullAmount(otherIncome.line8FromSchedule1(), manualOtherIncomeLine8)`. Used by imported-return scenarios. Closes 6a.md GAP T2.2. |
| `employment-income-taxpayer` | `users/{uid}/employment-income-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | `inmateWagesAmount` — feeds Schedule 1 line 8u (W-2 box 14 with inmate-wages flag). Extracted at `prepare()` ~line 417 before `computeOtherIncomes()`. |
| `employment-income-spouse` | `users/{uid}/employment-income-spouse` | Spouse | `inmateWagesAmount` — feeds line 8u. Null-shadowed on MFS. |
| `foreign-earned-income-taxpayer` | `users/{uid}/foreign-earned-income-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | Passed as `foreignEarnedIncomeTaxpayer` into `computeOtherIncomes()`; used by `computeForm2555ExclusionForSsWorksheet()` inline to auto-compute line 8d FEIE (Form 2555 lines 45+50) when user has no manual override. |
| `foreign-earned-income-spouse` | `users/{uid}/foreign-earned-income-spouse` | Spouse | Same purpose for spouse. |
| `medicaid-waiver-taxpayer` | `users/{uid}/medicaid-waiver-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | Read by `computeMedicaidWaiverPayments()` which produces `MedicaidComputation.schedule1Line8s()` for line 8s (negative offset) |
| `medicaid-waiver-spouse` | `users/{uid}/medicaid-waiver-spouse` | Spouse | Same for spouse. |

---

## Input statement forms

| Statement type | Firestore collection | Fields consumed | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1099-G | `users/{uid}/1099-g` | `unemploymentCompensationAmount` (box 1) — auto-parsed via `entries1099G.stream()` into line 7. `taxableRefundsAmount` (box 2) — auto-parsed into Schedule 1 line 1 (`TaxReturnComputeService.java` ~13421-13447; closure of 8.md §4.7, 2026-06-07); advisory flag if user-fill diverges. | Gating validation (`received1099G` / `uploaded1099G`); auto-stream into line 7 (unemployment) and line 1 (state refunds); entry count drives `OTHER_INCOME_MISSING_UPLOADED_1099_G`. |
| 1099-C | `users/{uid}/1099-c` | `amountOfDebtDischargedAmount` (box 2) — auto-parsed via `entries1099C.stream()` into line 8c. | Gating validation (`received1099C` / `uploaded1099C`); auto-stream into line 8c; entry count drives `OTHER_INCOME_MISSING_UPLOADED_1099_C`. |
| W-2 | `users/{uid}/w-2` | `nonqualifiedPlansAmount` (box 11) — consumed via `sumW2Box11Nqdc(w2Entries)` | Feeds Schedule 1 line 8t (NQDC) automatically — even WITHOUT the Other incomes personal form (single-source attribution per `TaxReturnComputeService.java:19875`). |
| W-2 (box 14 inmate-wages flag) | `users/{uid}/w-2` | `employmentFormInmateWages*` aggregate (via `employment-income-{taxpayer,spouse}` form's `inmateWagesAmount`) | Feeds Schedule 1 line 8u (incarcerated wages). MFS-guarded. |
| W-2G | `users/{uid}/w-2-g` | gambling winnings | Routes to line 8b (NOT auto-summed yet — user-fill via `otherIncomeGambling8b`). |
| Form 2555 | (compute-time form, not raw statement) | Lines 45 + 50 (FEIE + housing exclusion) | Auto-computed inline in `computeOtherIncomes()` via `computeForm2555ExclusionForSsWorksheet`; negative entry to line 8d. User `otherIncomeForeignEarnedIncomeExclusion8d` overrides via `firstNonNullAmount(manual, auto)`. The old `importedForm2555Line8dForeignExclusion` write-back path is superseded. |
| Form 8853 | `users/{uid}/form-8853` | Compute write-back via `importedForm8853Line8e` | Feeds line 8e (Archer MSA). |
| Form 8889 | `users/{uid}/form-8889` | Compute write-back via `importedForm8889Line8f` | Feeds line 8f (HSA). |

**Auto-parse priority** (line 7 + line 8c): statement auto-parsed totals take precedence over legacy manual imported fields via `firstNonNullAmount(statementTotal, legacyImportedField)`. User-entered line amounts (`unemploymentCompensationLine7`, `otherIncomeCancellationOfDebt8c`) always add on top of whichever imported/auto value is active.

**Line 1 taxable refunds** — historically user-fill only (`imported1099GLine1TaxableRefunds`); as of 2026-06-07 ALSO auto-parsed from 1099-G box 2 entries (8.md §4.7 closure). User-fill overrides; advisory flag fires when user-fill diverges from parsed sum (consistent with Pub. 525 tax-benefit-rule worksheet producing a reduced taxable portion).

---

## Computed inputs from other passes

| Source | Pass / Method | Role in line 8 computation |
|---|---|---|
| `MedicaidComputation.schedule1Line8s()` | `computeMedicaidWaiverPayments()` (runs before `computeOtherIncomes()` in `prepare()`) | Supplies Schedule 1 line 8s (negative Medicaid waiver offset) — sourced from `form-medicaid-waiver-*` personal form |
| Form 8814 `line12OtherIncomeToSchedule1` | `computeChildInterestDividends()` (runs before line 8 in `prepare()`) | Added to `additionalIncome.otherIncomeForm8814`, `totalOtherIncome` (line 9), and `totalAdditionalIncome` (line 10) by `applyForm8814Line12ToSchedule1()` — separate from the 8a–8z grid |
| Form 2555 inline | `computeForm2555ExclusionForSsWorksheet(foreignEarnedIncomeTaxpayer, foreignEarnedIncomeSpouse)` — called inside `computeOtherIncomes()` | Auto-computes line 8d FEIE; user override via `otherIncomeForeignEarnedIncomeExclusion8d`. **Known gap (project_form2555_doesnt_net_wages_from_agi.md)**: line 1z stays at full W-2 wages and the FEIE exclusion does NOT auto-route through line 8d to reduce AGI in some seeding scenarios. |
| Form 8853 compute write-back | `computeForm8853()` → `importedForm8853Line8e` in personal form | Feeds line 8e |
| Form 8889 compute write-back | `computeForm8889()` → `importedForm8889Line8f` in personal form | Feeds line 8f |
| `employmentFormInmateWagesTaxpayer/Spouse` | Extracted at `prepare()` ~line 417 from `employment-income-{taxpayer,spouse}` form | Passed into `computeOtherIncomes()` for Schedule 1 line 8u |

| `form1040.income.otherIncomeSchedule1` | `Income.otherIncomeSchedule1` | **Form 1040 line 8** = Schedule 1 line 10 (or `manualOtherIncomeLine8` override) |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.form1099KPersonalItemsDisclosureAmount` | `Schedule1AdditionalIncome.form1099KPersonalItemsDisclosureAmount` | Top-of-Schedule-1 1099-K entry space (disclosure only — does NOT affect line 9 or line 10) |

| `schedule1.additionalIncome.alimonyReceived` | (line 2a) | Pre-2019 agreement only |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.alimonyReceivedAgreementDate` | (line 2b) | Informational date string |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.businessIncomeLoss` | (line 3) | Schedule C — out-of-scope placeholder |

| `schedule1.additionalIncome.rentalRealEstateRoyalties` | (line 5) | Schedule E |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.farmIncomeLoss` | (line 6) | Schedule F — out-of-scope placeholder |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.unemploymentCompensation` | (line 7) | Net of 2025 repayment |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeNetOperatingLoss` | (line 8a, negative) | NOL deduction |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeGambling` | (line 8b) | W-2G |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeCancellationOfDebt` | (line 8c) | 1099-C box 2 |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeForeignEarnedIncomeExclusion` | (line 8d, negative) | Form 2555 lines 45 + 50 |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeForm8853` | (line 8e) | Archer MSA |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeForm8889` | (line 8f) | HSA |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeAlaskaPermanentFundDividends` | (line 8g) | Distinct line item — do NOT collapse into 8z |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeJuryDutyPay` | (line 8h) | Paired with Sched 1 line 24a give-back |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomePrizesAwards` | (line 8i) | |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeNotForProfitActivity` | (line 8j) | Hobby income |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeStockOptions` | (line 8k) | |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeRentalPersonalProperty` | (line 8l) | Paired with Sched 1 line 24b expenses |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeOlympicParalympicAwards` | (line 8m) | Paired with Sched 1 line 24c (auto-populates 24c when AGI ≤ $1M / $500k MFS) |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeSection951a` | (line 8n) | §951(a) CFC subpart F — from Form 5471 Sched I |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeSection951A` | (line 8o) | §951A GILTI — from Form 8992 Part II line 5 |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeSection461l` | (line 8p) | Excess business loss adjustment |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeAbleAccountDistributions` | (line 8q) | |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeScholarshipGrants` | (line 8r) | Non-W-2 scholarships; degree candidates only nonqualified (room/board/travel) |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeMedicaidWaiverPayments` | (line 8s, negative) | Nontaxable Medicaid waiver in line 1a/1d |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp` | (line 8t) | W-2 box 11 |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated` | (line 8u) | W-2 box 14 inmate-wages |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeDigitalAssets` | (line 8v) | Digital-asset ordinary income / pension-disaster |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeOther` | (line 8z) | Sum of list items (description + amount) |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeForm8814` | (line 9 add-on) | Form 8814 line 12 child other income |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.totalOtherIncome` | (line 9) | Sum of 8a–8z + Form 8814 line 12 |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.totalAdditionalIncome` | (line 10) | = Form 1040 line 8 |
| `schedule1.otherIncomeItems[]` | `List<Schedule1OtherIncomeItem>` | Line 8z detail rows |
| `form4797`, `form4684` | `RequiredAttachmentForm` | Stubs when line 4 nonzero |
| `scheduleE` | `RequiredAttachmentForm` | Stub when line 5 nonzero |
| `form2555` | `RequiredAttachmentForm` | Stub when line 8d nonzero |
| `form8853` | `RequiredAttachmentForm` | Stub when line 8e nonzero |
| `form8889` | `RequiredAttachmentForm` | Stub when line 8f nonzero |

---

## Inclusion / offset pairs (cross-Schedule-1 linkages)

- **8h / 24a** — jury duty pay vs employer give-back.
- **8l / 24b** — personal-property rental gross vs deductible expenses.
- **8m / 24c** — Olympic / Paralympic / USOC gross vs nontaxable exclusion (when AGI including the amount ≤ $1,000,000 / $500,000 MFS). Auto-populates 24c via the `olympicLine8m` parameter passed to `computeIncomeAdjustments()`; user-entered 24c overrides.

---

## Downstream consumers

| Consumer | Line / Form | Input used |
|---|---|---|
| Form 1040 line 9 total income | `computeTotalIncome()` | `otherIncome.line8FromSchedule1()` = S1 line 10 (8th and last operand at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:7439-7442`) |
| AGI computation (lines 11a/11b) | `computeAGI()` | line 9 inheritance |
| Schedule 1 line 24c Olympic exclusion | `computeIncomeAdjustments()` | `otherIncomeOlympicParalympicAwards` (line 8m) — auto-populates 24c; user-fill overrides |
| Form 6251 AMTI | `buildForm6251()` | `taxableRefundsStateLocal` → AMT line 2b (negative adjustment); unemployment repayment also used in AMT base |
| Social Security worksheet line 3 | `computeSocialSecurityBenefits()` | Line 8 (full Schedule 1 line 10) included in worksheet line 3 (Pub. 915 standard worksheet) |
| PDF export — Schedule 1 | `f1040s1_field_mapping_semantic.csv` | All Schedule 1 Part I line fields |
| PDF export — Form 1040 | `f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv` | `line8_other_income_schedule1` |

---

## Blocking flags emitted

| Flag code | Severity | Condition |
|---|---|---|
| `OTHER_INCOME_STATEMENT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED` | BLOCKING | `hadAdditionalIncomeForSchedule1=true` AND `confirmAllReceivedOtherIncomeStatementsUploaded != true` |
| `OTHER_INCOME_MISSING_UPLOADED_1099_G` | BLOCKING | `received1099G=true` AND (`uploaded1099G != true` OR no 1099-G entries in Firestore) |
| `OTHER_INCOME_MISSING_UPLOADED_1099_C` | BLOCKING | `received1099C=true` AND (`uploaded1099C != true` OR no 1099-C entries in Firestore) |
| `OTHER_INCOME_SCHEDULE_C_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | BLOCKING | `hasScheduleCBusinessIncomeOutOfScope=true` on taxpayer OR spouse form (MFJ); taxpayer-only on MFS |
| `OTHER_INCOME_SCHEDULE_F_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | BLOCKING | `hasScheduleFFarmIncomeOutOfScope=true` on taxpayer OR spouse form (MFJ); taxpayer-only on MFS |
| `OTHER_INCOME_SECTION_962_ELECTION_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | BLOCKING | `hasSection962CfcElection=true` on taxpayer OR spouse form |
| `OTHER_INCOME_ALIMONY_DATE_REQUIRED` | ADVISORY | `line2a > 0` AND `alimonyAgreementDateLine2b` is absent/blank |

**Note**: Form 8862 EIC re-cert is **NOT** a line 8 concern — it lives in the EIC (Line 27 / Schedule 6) workflow.

---

## Compute order dependency

`computeOtherIncomes()` must run **after:**
- `computeMedicaidWaiverPayments()` — supplies `MedicaidComputation.schedule1Line8s()`
- Employment income forms loaded — `inmateWagesAmount` extracted before call
- Foreign-earned-income forms loaded — `foreignEarnedIncomeTaxpayer/Spouse` extracted before call (for inline line 8d compute)
- W-2 entries loaded — `sumW2Box11Nqdc(w2Entries)` needs full W-2 list
- 1099-G and 1099-C entries loaded — gating validation AND auto-parse streaming

`applyForm8814Line12ToSchedule1()` must run **after:**
- `computeChildInterestDividends()` (Form 8814 list computed in `prepare()`)
- `applySchedule1AdditionalIncome()` (Schedule1 object must be initialized)

`computeOtherIncomes()` must run **before:**
- `buildIncome()` — needs `line8FromSchedule1()` for Form 1040 line 8
- `computeTotalIncome()` — line 9 sum
- `computeAGI()` — needs complete total income
- `computeIncomeAdjustments()` — receives `olympicLine8m` parameter for auto-populating Sched 1 line 24c
- `computeSocialSecurityBenefits()` — line 8 in SS worksheet line 3

---

| `Income.java` | `src/main/java/com/ustax/model/output/Income.java` |

---

## Key invariants

1. **Line 10 null-preserving sum** — `addNonNull` returns null when ALL operands are null, so no Schedule 1 is produced when there is no Part I input.
2. **`manualOtherIncomeLine8` override** — `firstNonNullAmount(otherIncome.line8FromSchedule1(), manualOtherIncomeLine8)` lets imported-return scenarios override the Schedule-1-derived line 8. Lives on the `social-security-benefits-taxpayer` form, NOT on `other-incomes-taxpayer`.
3. **Negative-entry sublines** — 8a (NOL), 8d (Form 2555 FEIE), 8s (Medicaid waiver) — these REDUCE line 9 and thereby line 10 (and Form 1040 line 8).
4. **Top-of-Schedule-1 1099-K entry-space** is **disclosure only** — NEVER in line 9 / line 10 / line 8 arithmetic. Personal item sold at a LOSS via 1099-K → top entry space only, NOT 8z. Personal item sold at a GAIN via 1099-K → Form 8949 / Schedule D, NOT top entry space.
5. **Schedule C / Schedule F out-of-scope** — set blocking flags, but compute still continues so the rest of Schedule 1 assembles; submission is gated.
6. **§962 election BLOCKING** — `hasSection962CfcElection` is out-of-scope; the related tax (if implemented) would route to Form 1040 line 16 box 3 write-in "962", NOT to 8n/8o.
7. **Form 8814 line 12 separation** — child other income flows through a separate `otherIncomeForm8814` field added to `totalOtherIncome` (line 9) — distinct from the 8a–8z grid. `applyForm8814Line12ToSchedule1()` runs AFTER `applySchedule1AdditionalIncome()`.
8. **MFS single-guard** — orchestrator-level `incomeOtherIncomeSpouse = null` and `employmentFormInmateWagesSpouse = null` on MFS. Every `addNonNull(taxpayerValue, spouseValue)` collapses to taxpayer-only. Schedule C / F out-of-scope flags fire only from taxpayer-side input on MFS. Lock-in test: `mfsExcludesSpouseOtherIncomeFromLine8`.
9. **Schedule 1 attachment trigger** — generate Schedule 1 if ANY Part I or Part II line is used OR the top 1099-K entry-space is populated. Do NOT use the narrower rule "attach only if line 8 nonzero" — that misses valid 2025 disclosure-only cases.
10. **Distinct sublines NOT in 8z** — Alaska Permanent Fund dividends (8g), Olympic/Paralympic (8m), digital assets (8v), incarcerated wages (8u), §951(a) (8n), §951A GILTI (8o) all have distinct lines; do NOT collapse into the 8z catch-all.
11. **W-2 box 11 → line 8t automatic** — even without `other-incomes-taxpayer` form (single-source attribution at line 19875).
12. **Form 8853/8889 write-back** — via `importedForm8853Line8e` / `importedForm8889Line8f` populated by their respective compute methods.
